assets.abstract: The neural mechanisms underlying interoception-the sensation of internal physiological states-remain largely unresolved. In this issue of Neuron, Livneh et al. (2020) demonstrate that the insula bridges different timescales of interoception by tracking and predicting thirst and hunger states.

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.
